# Minter — Website Design Agency

## Identity
**Name:** Minter
**Website:** https://minter-agency.vercel.app
**Email:** hello@minter.design
**Calendly:** https://calendly.com/minterai/15-minute-web-design-meeting
**GitHub:** https://github.com/Mxj0r
**LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/company/minter

## Who We Serve
Minter is a done-for-you website design agency targeting local service businesses in the US and UK. We build, host, optimize, and maintain professional websites on a flat monthly retainer — then handle everything that pops up, forever.

**Primary niches:**
- Trades (plumbers, electricians, HVAC, builders, roofers)
- Hospitality (restaurants, cafes, pubs)
- Home services, salons, medical/dental practices, fitness studios

**Positioning:** Help/Support — we frame outreach as helping busy owners capture missed opportunities, not a sales pitch.

**Target markets:** US (suburbs of Austin, Houston, LA, and major metros) and UK (London suburbs, Manchester, Birmingham).

---

## Services

### Website Design & Development
Custom, mobile-responsive websites built for conversion. Designed in-browser, deployed to Vercel. Optimized for Core Web Vitals and includes basic SEO setup.

- **US:** $900 build
- **UK:** £900 build

### Monthly Maintenance & Support (Retainer)
All-in-one retainer covers hosting, unlimited edits, minor SEO updates, and priority support. For qualifying businesses, includes a dedicated virtual receptionist.

- **US:** $350/mo
- **UK:** £350/mo

### Add-Ons
- **AI Live Chat Widget** — Automated Q&A widget trained on your business info. +$97/mo or +£80/mo
- **Google Business Profile Optimization** — Audit and optimization of your GBP listing. $247 one-time / £200 one-time
- **Advanced SEO Audit** — Full technical SEO report with prioritized fix list. $347 one-time / £280 one-time

---

## Pricing Summary

| Tier | US Price | UK Price |
|------|----------|----------|
| Website Build | $900 | £900 |
| Monthly Retainer (all-inclusive) | $350/mo | £350/mo |
| AI Chat Widget (add-on) | +$97/mo | +£80/mo |
| GBP Optimization (add-on) | $247 one-time | £200 one-time |
| Advanced SEO Audit (add-on) | $347 one-time | £280 one-time |

---

## Process
1. **Discovery Call** — 15-minute call to understand your business, goals, and current web presence
2. **Design & Build** — Custom website based on your brief, typically 5–10 business days
3. **Review & Launch** — You review, we polish, then we deploy to production
4. **Ongoing Support** — Monthly retainer covers hosting, updates, and optimization

---

## Technical Details
- **Hosting:** Vercel (fast, global CDN, SSL included)
- **Domains:** Custom domain setup included
- **SEO:** Core Web Vitals optimized, basic on-page SEO included; advanced SEO available as add-on
- **Mobile:** All sites fully responsive
- **Availability:** Clients across the US and UK

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How much does a professional website cost for a small business?
Professional website design for a small business starts at $900 in the US or £900 in the UK. This covers a custom-designed, mobile-responsive site built for conversion. Monthly maintenance and hosting starts at $350/mo or £350/mo, which includes unlimited edits, AI live chat, and minor SEO updates.

### What does website maintenance include?
A website maintenance retainer typically includes hosting, security updates, speed optimization, minor content edits, and minor SEO changes. For a flat monthly fee, Minter's retainer covers all of this plus an AI live chat widget and a quarterly performance review — with no limit on how many edits you request.

### How long does it take to build a website?
Most business websites are designed and launched within 5–10 business days from the start of the project. Minter's process is: audit, build, launch, then ongoing maintenance every month.

### Do I need a website maintenance contract?
No contract is required. Minter's retainer is month-to-month — you can cancel anytime with no cancellation fees. The only commitment is the initial website build, which is a one-time payment.

### What's included in the free website audit?
The free website audit is a full health check of your current website, including an SEO gap analysis, conversion rate review, and actionable recommendations — all delivered within 24 hours in plain English. No sales pitch, no obligation.

### What businesses does Minter work with?
Minter specializes in websites for local service businesses: trades (plumbers, electricians, HVAC, builders), hospitality (restaurants, cafes, pubs), home services, salons, medical and dental practices, and fitness studios. Operating across the US (Austin, Houston, LA, major metros) and UK (London suburbs, Manchester, Birmingham).

---

## Process (HowTo)

1. **Request a free website audit** — Submit your email to get a free health check of your current web presence
2. **Discovery call** — 15-minute call to understand your business, goals, and brief
3. **Design, build, and launch** — Custom website deployed and optimized within 5–10 business days
4. **Ongoing maintenance every month** — Performance reviews, updates, and unlimited edits — forever
